scripts.refresh: node ../scripts/refresh-events.mjs && node ../scripts/refresh-news.mjs && node ../scripts/refresh-trash.mjs && node ../scripts/refresh-holidays.mjs && node ../scripts/refresh-fleamarkets.mjs && node ../scripts/refresh-family.mjs
scripts.validate: node ../scripts/validate-events.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-news.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-trash.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-holidays.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-fleamarkets.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-family.mjs
scripts.refresh:build: npm run refresh && npm run validate && npm run build
